home.title: CV Generator
home.subtitle: Single-page CV editor and preview
home.welcomeTitle: Build, review, and export your CV
home.welcomeDescription: Edit every CV section, follow the live preview, and export as PDF, DOCX, or JSON.

editor.personalDescription: Core personal and contact details for your CV header.

editor.languagesDescription: List languages with proficiency level and notes.

editor.previewDescription: This panel reflects your current visible data.
editor.emptyContacts: Email, phone, and location will appear here.
editor.volunteerDescription: Add volunteer experiences and other involvement with organizations.
editor.projectsDescription: List your personal or professional projects with links and details.
editor.extrasDescription: Additional information such as awards, certifications, or other highlights.
